instruction: IMS 是什么？HSS 在 IMS 中的角色是什么？
output: The IP Multimedia Subsystem (IMS) defined by 3GPP is a generic architecture that provides multimedia and voice over IP services. The IMS enables convergence of and access to real time services, streaming, messaging, data and web-based technologies. Home subscriber server (HSS) is embodied by the product Nokia CMS-8200 HSS, which provides subscriber data storage and handling, as well as support for authentication, routing, and subscriber administration.

instruction: 如何检查 Pod 状态以及如何判断 Pod 是否有问题？
output: Login to the Kubernetes control node and execute: kubectl get pod -n <namespace>. In the Ready column of the command output, if there is a mismatch in the number of containers (for example, it is 2/3 or 7/8 for a particular pod), it indicates that the Pod has issues. To check which container is not ready: kubectl get po <pod name> -o json -n <namespace> | jq -c ".status.containerStatuses[] | {Container: .name, Ready: .ready}"
